violations.text: Refrigerator door gaskets were observed in poor repair on the grill cooler drawers and the upstairs bar cooler. Refrigerator door gaskets shall be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 02/20/2026

The dump sink in the upstairs bar is lacking an air gap. A direct connection must not exist between the sewage system and a drain originating from equipment in which food is placed. New Violation. Correct By: 02/03/2026
The floor grout and tiles in the kitchen area are in poor repair. The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 05/20/2026
